title: Civilizations
description: Discover ancient civilizations, come face to face with their leaders and summon their gods. Visit Wonders of the Ancient and Modern World.
body:
Welcome to Civilizations

Discover ancient civilizations, interact with civilians, meet their leaders and summon their gods. Visit Wonders of the Ancient and Modern World.

🏠 Custom Structures

💰 Currencies

🙍‍♂️ Trade with civilians

🗡️ Custom weapons

⚔️ Fight civilization leaders

😇 Summon and defeat Gods

🎵 Soundtracks for Boss Fights

✨ Custom Advancements

-----------------
Join the Discord: https://discord.gg/CMv3ZnRT2c

-----------------

Civilizations:

- Ancient Egypt

![Ancient Egypt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da3c0d5fccfa94376fc1cf6d88813454684c705c.png)

- Chinese Empire

![Chinese Empire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97e2521cef087d4d3cd833b1bde1bb615007c8fd.png)

- Ancient Rome

![Ancient Rome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec7e42a4d631df3260aed3bf677c088cb46fce22.png)

- Ancient Greece

![Ancient Greece](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2ce890f71108f9315ad2861083cd29e15ddbbc2.png)

- Norse Civilization

![Norse Civilization](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d41dd8165e8c5ba1e866be6928bdef47d024af10.png)


Bosses:

- Pharaoh Khufu

![Pharaoh Khufu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8275dc0b375bf4e61dc73fd48640d69bc71874aa.png)

- Emperor Qin Shi Huang

![Qin Shi Huang](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e27ba1b00a3619015a93121fb8fde48700906487.png)

- Julius Caesar

![Julius Caesar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ada85c4e7f79f85dee8caa7ec2b68d5cee3a625c.png)

- Alexander The Great

![Alexander The Great](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3f4968e089c6265cdd4ed8b891fc4f8568d9c73.png)

- Björn Ironside

![Björn Ironside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ea4f6876f2d550a36063da3a5b1d32055d8c61a.png)

Gods:

- Anubis, God of the dead

![Anubis](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7568b7be0ccd404ecbba564d7a315aa4d16ba39.png)

- Sun Wukong, Handsome Monkey King

![Wukong](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9a616f6792e79f3ce218efb6edfea265319826f.png)

- Mercury, Messenger of the Gods

![Mercury](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/054465a39a52e5aedcd6eac9b14bdecab89e85e1.png)

- Artemis, Goddess of the hunt

![Artemis](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95cf35980c5b5f41b6acc4e4a5532a0de609ef59.png)

- Loki, God of mischief and trickery

![Loki](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53caa7a2fb05e9fd5f3af8c7a339a1bdc02bd0e7.png)
